name: 6p21_32_HLA_DRB_paralog_array
description: 6p21.32 HLA-DRB sub-region — the most copy-number-variable paralog array within the MHC. Haplotype-dependent presence of DRB1, DRB3, DRB4, DRB5 plus pseudogenes DRB2/DRB6/DRB7/DRB8/DRB9. DRB paralog identity 90-99%. Read mapping at exon 2 (peptide-binding groove) is critically PSV-dependent. Cross-reference: detailed annotation in specific_loci/mhc/.

architecture.internal_structure: Haplotype-dependent DRB array: DR1/10/14/15/16 carry DRB1 only; DR3/11/12/13/14 carry DRB1+DRB3; DR4/7/9 carry DRB1+DRB4; DR15/16 carry DRB1+DRB5; plus pseudogenes; DRB exon-2 paralog identity 90-99%.
